## 🚨 URGENT — Deadline in <7 Days

### Prix Ars Electronica 2026 — **Deadline: March 4, 2026**
Submissions close in **3 days**. Four categories:
- **Digital Humanity**
- **Interactive Art+**
- **New Animation Art**
- **u19 — create your world**

Prize: €10,000 per Golden Nica. Submit at: https://ars.electronica.art/prix/en/opencall/

Relevant to Amber's work on machine behavior, agent ethology, and AI art. **Worth considering a submission.**

## 📅 Key People — Recent Activity

### Yuk Hui
- **Lecture: March 2, 2026** (tomorrow) — "Dialogues on Philosophy and Technology #3: Towards an Epistemology of Technical Detail" at Erasmus University Rotterdam. Online, free, with Prof. Xavier Guchet. Register at: https://www.eur.nl/en/esphil/events/dialogues-philosophy-and-technology-3-2026-03-02
- LA Review of Books published a fresh conversation with Hui on technodiversity (Feb 18, 2026): https://lareviewofbooks.org/article/on-technodiversity-a-conversation-with-yuk-hui

### Bogna Konior
- New book **"The Dark Forest Theory of the Internet"** (Polity Books) — reviewed on East Contemporary blog (Jan 28, 2026). Explores Liu Cixin's dark forest theory + internet as site of first contact with inhuman cognition.
- Earlier podcast episode (Sep 2025, Aksioma) on the same themes: "Silence in the Dark Forest."

---

## 🏛️ Institutions

### ESEA Contemporary (Manchester)
- **Thresholds of Becoming** — running **Feb 21–May 17, 2026** (free entry)
- 40th anniversary exhibition. Artists: Nicole Coson, Xin Liu, Charmaine Poh, Minoru Nomata, Yang Yongliang, Yin Aiwen
- Curated by director Xiaowen Zhu. Probes "architectures of transition and fragile ecologies of the in-between."
- Strong overlap with Amber's interests (East Asian artists, more-than-human themes). Worth a visit.
- https://www.eseacontemporary.org/exhibition/thresholds-of-becoming

### Serpentine Galleries (London)
- 2026 programme announced: David Hockney (March 12–Aug 23), Cecily Brown, Amar Kanwar
- **25th Pavilion** by LANZA atelier (curving brick design) — design revealed Jan 2026
- https://www.serpentinegalleries.org/whats-on/2026-at-serpentine/

### Barbican (London)
- **Young Barbican Takeover** — March 29, 2026 (12–6pm). One-day festival for young creatives (16+). Not directly relevant but good for London arts scene.

### Oxford Internet Institute
- Postdoctoral Researcher position advertised (Feb 6, closing Feb 26 — now closed). With Prof. Ekaterina Hertog's Digital Parenting & Youth Online Behaviour group. Too late to apply.

## 📋 CFPs & Conferences

### ALIFE 2026
- **Waterloo, Canada + online, Aug 17–21, 2026**
- Theme: "Living and Lifelike Complex Adaptive Systems"
- **Full papers & summaries deadline: March 30, 2026**
- Special sessions deadline was Feb 28 (just passed)
- Topics include embodied intelligence, synthetic biology, evolutionary systems, ethics
- Open access proceedings (MIT Press)
- https://2026.alife.org/call-for-papers/
- **Directly relevant to Amber's ALife interests. Paper deadline is 29 days out.**

### transmediale 2026 (Berlin)
- Festival curation open call closed (deadline was Feb 2025 — that cycle is done)
- Open calls for residents 2026 noted on their site — worth checking: https://transmediale.de/de/news/open-calls-for-residents-2026

### Santa Fe Institute Complexity Postdoctoral Fellowship
- 2026 cohort applications closed (deadline Oct 1, 2025)
- **2027 cohort will open in July 2026** — flag for future
